metadata.description: Quantori Engineering Marketplace — installable Claude Code capabilities (skills, plugins, commands) for Quantori engineers. Organized by competency: JavaScript/TypeScript first, more to come.

references.name: GSD (Get Shit Done)
references.note: Patterns borrowed: capped reviewer→fixer loop, slopcheck seed, namespace routing.

plugins.name: js-testing
plugins.description: TypeScript testing atoms: analyze coverage, write tests, review code. Detects Jest/Vitest; React-aware.
